differential_diagnoses: Delirium due to occult medical illness
Bipolar I disorder with catatonic features
next_steps: Obtain serum TSH, free T4, free T3, and TPO antibodies
Send CSF and serum autoimmune encephalitis panel (including anti-NMDA receptor antibodies)
Perform continuous EEG monitoring to rule out non-convulsive status epilepticus
Empiric trial of high-dose corticosteroids if thyroid function and infectious workup are negative and SREAT is suspected
Comprehensive metabolic and toxicologic investigation, including serum ammonia and heavy metal screen
